summary: Frontend-only testing for 3 UI bug fixes: (1) New Task dialog design on mobile, (2) SMM FAB opens dialog instead of navigation, (3) Event detail page buttons don't overlap content. All 5 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: New Task dialog opens with correct design - icons (FileText, Calendar) visible in task-item-input elements
New Task dialog has proper buttons (скасувати, додати) in detail-actions container
FAB on SMM page (/smm) opens 'нове smm завдання' dialog - does NOT navigate to Events
SMM dialog shows Instagram icon and has correct task-item-input design
Event detail page (/event/{id}/view) has buttons with position:fixed at bottom:64px
Event detail page content has pb-40 class - buttons do not overlap content
Mobile navigation works correctly between all 5 tabs (завдання, smm, події, аналітика, налаштування)
Google Calendar status API (/api/oauth/calendar/status) returns connection status correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 UI bug fixes verified working: (1) New Task dialog has icons and modern design with task-item-input elements, (2) SMM FAB opens dialog setShowNewSMMDialog(true) instead of navigate('/events'), (3) Event detail page action buttons are fixed position at bottom:64px with z-index:40, content has pb-40 padding. Google Calendar OAuth endpoints are present but not fully tested (would need OAuth credentials).
